description: '''Mathcore''' is a subgenre of [[hardcore punk]] and [[metalcore]] that developed during the 1990s, influenced by [[post-hardcore]], [[extreme metal]] and [[math rock]]. The genre features complex and variable rhythms with songs featuring [[irregular time signatures]], [[polymeters]], [[syncopations]] and [[tempo]] changes. Bands such as [[Converge (band)|Converge]], [[Botch (band)|Botch]], [[Coalesce (band)|Coalesce]] and [[The Dillinger Escape Plan]] helped to establish the genre.
